title: Supply Chain Manager - DB Schenker India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DB Schenker India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
